meaning: adj.失策的,不得当的,不审慎的,没见识的
examples: It would have been impolitic to refuse his offer.
It is impolitic to offend people who can help you.
It was impolitic to pay the slightest tribute t the enemy.
You can see why this impolitic ex-lieutenant governor did not last long as a politician.
He has a pattern of saying impolitic things in public that lead to a backlash and an apology later.
